markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on 2026 goals and unblock content production.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** To clear the PMM review backlog, HX will adopt a "bias to publish" model. Content will be tiered by risk (e.g., low-risk definitional vs. high-risk competitor), and top performers (e.g., 50+ views) will be prioritized for deep review.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**PSEO Project Acceleration:** The first PSEO project is unblocked by a new internal SME. A major acceleration is possible if GrowthX's engineering team can build the wireframe directly, bypassing the need for an external agency.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Strategic Re-alignment:** All content will now support the "Underwriting Intelligence" narrative, targeting the Chief Underwriting Officer (CUO) persona. GrowthX will audit existing assets to find SEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**New AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX introduced "CheckPAT," a new tool for tracking AI citation share, sentiment, and position against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Strategic Alignment

  - [**North Star:** Increase engagement with addressable ICP accounts, focusing on first-touch signals for executive personas.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Primary Narrative:** "Underwriting Intelligence."](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Persona Focus:** CUO (Chief Underwriting Officer).](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Shift from lower-funnel guides to top-of-funnel content that captures existing market search around "underwriting intelligence."](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
      - [**Asset Audit:** GrowthX will audit non-SEO-optimized campaign assets to identify opportunities for SEO-driven versions.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)

### Content Production & Velocity

  - [**Problem:** The PMM review process is a bottleneck, causing a large backlog and slow publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Solution:** Adopt a "bias to publish" model with tiered content review.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
          - [**Low-Risk (Publish First):** Definitional articles, simple refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
          - [**High-Risk (Prioritize Review):** Competitor comparisons, technical guides.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Performance Trigger:** Articles reaching 50 views will be flagged for deep review, ensuring quality for content gaining traction.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [**Process Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Notion Board:** GrowthX will reorganize the board by content type.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Review Queues:** "Franki Review" → "Editorial Review" (expandable to other team members).](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### PSEO Project Acceleration

  - [**Blocker Resolved:** A new internal SME will provide the necessary actuarial review, unblocking the project.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)
  - [**Potential Acceleration:** GrowthX's engineering team is scoping the effort to build the wireframe directly in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Impact:** This would bypass the need for an external web agency, significantly accelerating the project.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [**Primary:** Organic search traffic from validated keyword volume.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Downstream AI visibility and citation share.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Board Meeting Prep

  - [**Request:** A high-level summary of GrowthX's work for the upcoming board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [State of the landscape (vs. competitors like Erniex).](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Identified opportunity areas (AI, LLM, citation).](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Project tracking and lift seen so far.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [**Format:** Bullet points in a Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### CheckPAT Tool Walkthrough

  - [GrowthX demoed CheckPAT, a new AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3143.0)
      - [**Competitive Analysis:** Tracks citation share, sentiment, and position against up to 30 competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3198.0)
      - [**B2B Focus:** Filters by decision stage and persona.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3263.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Includes a shared library with historical data for instant insights.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3442.0)
  - [**Access:** Bailey will grant access to the HX team.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
      - [Deliver board meeting summary this week.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [Confirm if their engineering team can build the PSEO wireframe.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [Reorganize the Notion content board by type.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Share the current CheckPAT prompt list in a spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3414.0)
      - [Grant CheckPAT access to the HX team.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3637.0)
      - [Develop a revised content strategy with metrics based on HX's new goals.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2680.0)
  - [**HX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2988.0)
      - [Confirm podcast embedding strategy by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Provide the PSEO SME review by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)
      - [Share all "Underwriting Intelligence" campaign assets with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/UdPZT3MgPYBG_GVzzc4rSSf26DNwC5Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)
